title: CHARACTERS
text: CHARACTERS Adds the supplied text inside an element. UXMLWRITER.CHARACTERS(Chars) Copy Parameters Table 1. CHARACTERS parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description Chars String IN Text to be added inside the element tags; maximum length is 10240000 bytes. Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. Description The CHARACTERS operation must follow a STARTELEMENT or another CHARACTERS invocation. It can be called repeatedly to create elements that exceed 10240000 bytes (almost 10 MB). The following characters are replaced by their XML notations: Table 2. Character XML notation < < > > & & " " ' ' Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
